reviews.comment:
Un lugar me muy completo y agradable. Lo conozco de muchos viajes. Viniendo de Santa Fe a Córdoba la autovía te saca por fuera de San Francisco, sin embargo prefiero entrar antes para poder pasar por ésta estación

(Translated by Google)
A very complete and pleasant place. I've been there on many trips. Coming from Santa Fe to Córdoba, the highway takes you outside of San Francisco, but I prefer to enter earlier so I can stop by this station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3904387536841865428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5eTdyaEJnEAE
